name: Improper Inventory Management
what_it_means: Unknown, outdated, or shadow APIs remain exposed without ownership, controls, or monitoring.
animated_example: Keys to old office doors still work because no one collected them.
quick_checks: Central API catalog with owner, data class, version, environment
Shadow/test endpoints blocked; old versions return 410
how_to_test: Compare runtime traffic with inventory; find unlisted APIs
expected_outcomes: Every endpoint mapped to an owner and lifecycle state
minimal_example: GET /v1/visitor on retired API → 410 Gone (or blocked)
